title: Senior Software Engineer - KPIT Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - KPIT Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About KPIT Technologies:
KPIT Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies!
